name: omarchy_hotkeys
content:
Hotkeys 
You can see a the main keyboard bindings with Super + K .
Navigating 
Hotkey Function
Super + Space Appication auncher
Super + Alt + Space Omarchy contro menu
Super + Escape Lock, suspend, reaunch, restart, shutdown
computer
Super + Ctrl + L Lock computer
Super + W Cose window
Ctrl + Alt + Del Cose a windows
Super + T Togge window between tiing/foating
Super + O Togge popping window into sticky'n'foating
Super + F Go fu screen
Super + Alt + F Go fu width
Super + 1/2/3/4 Jump to specific workspace
Super + Tab Jump to next workspace
Super + Shift + Tab Jump to previous workspace
Super + Ctrl + Tab Jump to former workspace
Super + Shift + 1/2/3/4 Move window to workspace
Super + Shift + Alt +
Arrows Move workspaces to directiona monitor
Super + Arrow Move focus to window in direction of arrow
Super + Shift + Arrow Swap window with another in direction of arrow
Super + Equal Grow windows to the eft
Super + Minus Grow windows to the right
Super + Shift + Equal Grow windows to the bottom
Super + Shift + Minus Grow windows to the top
Super + G Togge window grouping
Super + Alt + G Move window out of grouping
Hotkeys · The Omarchy Manual · DHH https://learn.omacom.io/2/the-omarchy-manual/53/hotkeys
1 of 8 2/2/26, 1:23 AM

---

Super + Alt + G Move window out of grouping
Super + Alt + Tab Cyce between windows in grouping
Super + Alt + 1/2/3/4 Jump to specific window in grouping
Super + Alt + Arrow Move window into grouping in direction of arrow
Super + Ctrl + Arrow Move between windows inside a tiing group
Super + S Show scratchpad workspace overay
Super + Alt + S Move window to scratchpad workspace
System contros 
Hotkey Function
Super + Ctrl + A Audio contros (wiremix)
Super + Ctrl + B Buetooth contros (buetui)
Super + Ctrl + W Wifi contros (impaa)
Super + Ctrl + S Share menu (via LocaSend)
Super + Ctrl + T Activity (btop)
Launching apps 
Hotkey Function
Super + Return Termina
Super + Shift + B Browser
Super + Shift + Alt + B Browser (private/incognito)
Super + Shift + F Fie manager
Super + Shift + M Music Spotify)
Super + Shift + / Password manager 1password)
Super + Shift + N Neovim
Super + Shift + C Caendar HEY
Super + Shift + E Emai HEY
AI ChatGPT
Hotkeys · The Omarchy Manual · DHH https://learn.omacom.io/2/the-omarchy-manual/53/hotkeys
2 of 8 2/2/26, 1:23 AM

---

Super + Shift + A AI ChatGPT
Super + Shift + G Messenger Signa
Super + Shift + Alt + G Messenger WhatsApp)
Super + Shift + Ctrl + G Messenger Googe
Super + Shift + D Docker LazyDocker)
Super + Shift + O Obsidian
Super + Shift + X X
Change/add bindings in ~/.config/hypr/bindings.conf.
Universa cipboard 
Hotkey Function
Super + C Copy
Super + X Cut (not in termina)
Super + V Paste
Super + Ctrl + V Cipboard manager
Usuay on Linux, you need Ctrl + Shift + C/V to copy'n'paste in the termina and Ctrl
+ C/V to do it everywhere ese. These Omarchy unified cipboard hotkeys work
everywhere (except the fie manager).
Capture 
Hotkey Function
Print Screen Screenshot with editing
Shift + Print Screen Screenshot straight to cipboard
Alt + Print Screen Screenrecord
Super + Print Screen Coor picker
Alt + Shift + L Copy current URL from webapp or Chromium
Super + Ctrl + X Hod to capture dictation (requires _Insta > AI  Dictation) \
Hotkeys · The Omarchy Manual · DHH https://learn.omacom.io/2/the-omarchy-manual/53/hotkeys
3 of 8 2/2/26, 1:23 AM

---

Super + Ctrl + X Hod to capture dictation (requires _Insta > AI  Dictation) \
With screenrecordings, hit the hotkey to start, hit it again to stop.
A capture options are aso accessibe under Capture in the Omarchy menu (Super + Alt
+ Space).
Notifications 
Hotkey Function
Super + , Dismiss atest notification
Super + Shift + , Dismiss a notifications
Super + Ctrl + , Togge siencing notifications
Super + Alt + , Invoke most recent notification
Stye 
Hotkey Function
Super + Ctrl + Shift + Space Pick a new theme
Super + Ctrl + Space Next background image for theme
Super + Backspace Togge transparency on a window
Extra background images ive in ~/.config/omarchy/current/backgrounds. You can put
more there to cyce through. Aso avaiabe via Insta > Background in the Omarchy menu.
A stye options are aso accessibe under Stye in the Omarchy menu (Super + Alt +
Space).
Togges 
Hotkey Function
Super + Ctrl + I Togge ide/seep prevention
Hotkeys · The Omarchy Manual · DHH https://learn.omacom.io/2/the-omarchy-manual/53/hotkeys
4 of 8 2/2/26, 1:23 AM

Super + Ctrl + I Togge ide/seep prevention
Super + Ctrl + N Togge nightight dispay temperature
Super + Shift + Space Togge the top bar
Super + Mute Switch to next audio output
Ghostty Termina 
Hotkey Function
Ctrl + Shift + E New spit beow
Ctrl + Shift + O New spit besides
Ctrl + Alt + Arrows Move between spits
Super + Ctrl + Shift + Arrows Resize spit by 10 ines
Super + Ctrl + Shift + Alt + Arrows Resize spit by 100 ines
Ctrl + Shift + T New tab
Ctrl + Shift + Arrows Move between tabs tab
Alt + Numbers Go to specific tab
Shift + Pg Up/Down Scro the history
Ctrl + Left mouse Open ink in browser
Fie Manager 
Hotkey Function
Ctrl + L Go to path
Space Preview fie (arrows navigate)
Backspace Go back one foder
Appe Dispay Brightness Contro 
Hotkeys · The Omarchy Manual · DHH https://learn.omacom.io/2/the-omarchy-manual/53/hotkeys

---

Appe dispays have their own brightness contro via asdcontrol:
Hotkey Function
Ctrl + F1 Turn down brightness
Ctrl + F2 Turn up brightness
Ctrl + Shift + F2 Turn up brightness to maximum
Neovim (w/ azyvim) 
Navigation 
Hotkey Function
Space Show command options
Space Space Open fie via fuzzy search
Space E Togge sidebar
Space G G Show git contros
Space S G Search fie content
Ctrl + W W Jump between sidebar and editor
Ctrl + Left/right arrow Change size of sidebar
Shift + H Go to eft fie tab
Shift + L Go to right fie tab
Space B D Cose fie tab
Whie in sidebar 
Hotkey Function
A Add new fie in parent dir
Shift + A Add new subdir in parent dir
D Deete highighted fie/dir
M Move highighted fie/dir
R Rename highighted fie/dir
? Show hep for a commands
Hotkeys · The Omarchy Manual · DHH https://learn.omacom.io/2/the-omarchy-manual/53/hotkeys
6 of 8 2/2/26, 1:23 AM

---

See a the Neovim hotkeys configured by LazyVim.
Quick Emojis 
You can use Super + Ctrl + E to show a compete emoji picker that' put the seection
on the cipboard or you can use these quick access options.
Hotkey EM Cue
CapsLock M S
 smie
CapsLock M C
 cry
CapsLock M L
 ove
CapsLock M V
 victory
CapsLock M H
 heart
CapsLock M Y
 yes
CapsLock M N
 no
CapsLock M F
 fuck
CapsLock M W
 wish
CapsLock M R
 rock
CapsLock M K
 kiss
CapsLock M E
 eyero
CapsLock M P
 pray
CapsLock M D
 droo
CapsLock M M
 money
CapsLock M X
 xeebrate
CapsLock M 1
 100%
CapsLock M T
 toast
CapsLock M O
 ok
CapsLock M G
 greeting
CapsLock M A
 arm
CapsLock M B
 bowing
Quick Competions 
Hotkeys · The Omarchy Manual · DHH https://learn.omacom.io/2/the-omarchy-manual/53/hotkeys
7 of 8 2/2/26, 1:23 AM

---

Quick Competions 
Hotkey Competion
CapsLock Space Space — (mdash)
CapsLock Space N Your name (as entered on setup)
CapsLock Space E Your emai (as entered on setup)
You can add more of your own by editing ~/.XCompose , then running omarchy-restart-
xcompose in the termina to get the changes picked up.
Hotkeys · The Omarchy Manual · DHH https://learn.omacom.io/2/the-omarchy-manual/53/hotkeys
